text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm taking a stroll through the
streets...

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: ...Over here. Hurry.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Tuxedo
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I cordially welcome you to
our casino tournament! The stakes—nothing but
your dignity as a high roller! Compete to your
heart's content, for today and today only! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for cryin' out loud. I thought I saw a fish outta
water, and here you are again.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Before you get any funny ideas, this tournament
is completely legit, all right? Despite the
unregistered busybodies stickin' their noses in.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Pssst! Look, it's her...
The legendary dealer—the Angel of the Night!
Oh, I can't believe I get to see her in person!
choice_data_list: Isn't that the woman we ran into by the river?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. Who do we have here? Hehe. Long time
no see.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well, well. Looks like Your Holiness is pretty popular.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, and I've chosen you as my opponent.
What do you say? Care to put your pride on the
line?

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: No way! An opponent handpicked by the Angel herself? Who is that? Snicker. Nobody beats the Angel...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
The name of the game is five-card draw. You can
pick your chips up at reception. The rules are
standard, for the most part.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: There is one twist, however. The loser has to provide a... tip, shall we say, for flushes and higher.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
So you're sayin' if someone plays a full house or a
four of a kind, the other player has to cough up
more dough outside of the pot?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Trainer. Watch my back, would ya? I don't
need any lookie-loos peekin' at my cards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins the poker match. The first round goes
to Nakayama Festa with a pair of kings. The
second ends in a draw, followed by another round
for Nakayama in the third bout.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a doubt, Nakayama Festa has luck on
her side. The fourth round commences with her
opponent's chips greatly diminished. Then, an
even better opportunity arises...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: ...I call. And you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...I got nothin'. I fold. Gimme a sec. I need some
fresh air.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We just finished the deck, right? Make sure ya
shuffle it while I'm gone.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: But you had three of a kind...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Show one, show all. Even if the hand's finished,
don't go around revealing the cards.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Besides, she had at least a flush. I'd have been
forced into payin' that so-called "tip" if I'd stayed
in.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's my hunch, at least. More importantly, I
wanted to get the deck shuffled.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We discarded our hands every round and were
dealt cards from the same deck. In other words,
we could count the cards.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's a way of figurin' out what cards are left in the
deck. She made me reveal my cards after every
round, remember? However...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now that I've made her shuffle the entire deck, all the knowledge of past cards she saved up has gone down the drain. Maybe it's time I took that "insane luck" for a spin.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, whaddya say we go for broke? Don't even
worry about the difference in chips. All or nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
What?! You're willing to throw away your lead? If
that's how you want to play... I may just have to
take you up on that!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Be my guest. My shoulders are crampin' up in anticipation... I don't wanna settle for anything safe—I'm hungry for the win.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now, Dealer. I want to draw one card, but... I'm going to choose which one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa closes her eyes and points to a
single card in the deck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the spitting image of Special Week during
the Tracen Concentration Card Game Tourney.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly afterward, the venue is abuzz with talk of
how an unnamed Umamusume defeated the
legendary dealer with a straight flush.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After which, fresh off of her victory, she promptly
disappeared from the premises without playing
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Nakayama Festa at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Sorry to leave you in the thick of it
the other day, but ya can't blame anyone for
wantin' to get away from all that commotion.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't after fame, after all. I just wanted a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice there's a bus parked up ahead of her.
Come to think of it, the morning news said that
she's racing today.
choice_data_list: On your way to the next challenge?
On your way to the next challenge?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Looks like it's gonna be a bit of a pain...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Still, you'd better watch. You're in for a
show.
